response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of polyglot experience, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, and demonstrated technical leadership through workshops and open-source work. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI systems, hands-on RAG/vector database experience, or Python depth — core requirements for this Staff GenAI role. Current career gap and limited cloud-platform breadth (mostly AWS via Optilyz) also weigh against a Staff-level GenAI hire.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js experience plus polyglot adaptability across many stacks
Strong engineering-excellence track record: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, public workshops
concerns: No clear 8+ years of production AI/ML delivery; GenAI exposure appears to be only the last ~7 months
Python and RAG/vector-database experience not evidenced on the resume
Currently on a caregiving career gap and limited multi-cloud (GCP/Azure) footprint

key_factors.factor: Insufficient years of production AI experience
Missing Python / RAG / vector DB evidence
